title: Aging's New Logic: Metabolic Reprogramming Beyond Calorie Restriction, And the Data That Demands Caution
description: The quest to reverse aging is moving beyond simple calorie restriction. This article explores the cutting-edge science of metabolic and epigenetic reprogramming, examining pathways like NAD+, AMPK, and Yamanaka factors. It dissects the profound promise of these interventions while rigorously scrutinizing the emerging data that demands caution, including potential risks and challenges to prevailing theories.
